name: AD Mixtape · Aquarium Drunkard Presents :: The Autumn Defense/ A Mixtape
description: With their second lp, 2003's Circles, John Stirratt and Pat Sansone united as the Autumn Defense to craft a set of winsome and sweet songs. For Stirratt, the album offered a detour from his role in Wilco. Soon after, Sansone would join the band too, and Circles offers a glimpse of what he'd bring to
